DataAutomationLibraryStatus.markdownDescription:
Status of DataAutomationLibrary

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: ACTIVE | DELETING  
Update requires: No interruption

KmsKeyId.markdownDescription:
KMS Key Identifier

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 2048  
Pattern: ^[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9:_/+=,@.-]+$  
Update requires: No interruption

KMS Encryption Configuration

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

EntityType.markdownDescription:

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: VOCABULARY  
Update requires: No interruption

LibraryArn.markdownDescription:
ARN generated at the server side when a DataAutomationLibrary is created

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 128  
Pattern: ^arn:aws(|-cn|-iso|-iso-[a-z]|-us-gov):bedrock:[a-zA-Z0-9-]*:[0-9]{12}:data-automation-library/[a-zA-Z0-9-]{12,36}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
